notes: (1) Follow highlight now actually obeys the Follow toggle. Active-block and TTS speaking-sentence classes are gated on followEnabled, and the toggle clears existing highlights when switched off / re-applies them when switched on. (2) Removed the dedicated Read-Aloud button bar from the transcript card. TTS for text-only tracks is driven entirely by the main Play/Pause button + sentence-click in the transcript. Voice / rate / pitch / pause-length controls remain in the TTS settings panel.
